poll_seconds.label: Poll interval (seconds)
poll_seconds.description: How often to read the mouse battery level

show_percent.label: Show percentage
show_percent.description: Show the numeric percentage next to the battery glyph

notify_low.label: Low battery notification
notify_low.description: Notify when the battery drops below the threshold (once per episode)

low_threshold.label: Low battery threshold (%)
low_threshold.description: Battery percentage that triggers the low battery notification
